title: Never Take No for an Answer
writer: Maurice Cloche, Paul Gallico, Pauline Gallico
actors: Vittorio Manunta, Denis O'Dea, Guido Celano
plot: Since the local church is not willing to bless Peppino's donkey for a successful recovery, Peppino went to Rome to see the Holy Father, in spite of the numerous difficulties of actually getting in to see him.
